LowGravity.title: Prefers low gravity
LowGravity.description: Being born and raised on a colony ship, which is where {pawn_name} has spent most of {pawn_possessive} life, means {pawn_possessive} bones and muscles have become accustomed to the artificial gravity commonly found on larger ships. This gravity is relatively weak which means {pawn_name} struggles more than others in high gravity areas.

HighGravity.title: Prefers high gravity
HighGravity.description: Years of living on a planet with a higher than usual amount of gravity has meant {pawn_name} now prefers higher gravity atmospheres.

Gay.title: Gay
Gay.description: {pawn_name} prefers those of the same sex as themselves.

Bisexual.title: Bisexual
Bisexual.description: {pawn_name} is attracted to both men and women.

Murderous.title: Murderous
Murderous.description: {pawn_name} has been known to murder others on occasions.

Pretty.title: Pretty
Pretty.description: {pawn_name} is naturally easy on the eyes.

PickPocket.title: Pick pocket
PickPocket.description: {pawn_name} has a general disregard for any sense of ownership.

Claustrophobic.title: Claustrophobic
Claustrophobic.description: Being in confined spaces is extremely stressful for {pawn_name}.

SocialButterfly.title: Social butterfly
SocialButterfly.description: {pawn_name} thrives when around others and dislikes being left alone.

Reclusive.title: Reclusive
Reclusive.description: {pawn_name} prefers to avoid the company of others.

Creative.title: Creative
Creative.description: {pawn_name} has a good eye for art and other creative activities.

Ambitious.title: Ambitious
Ambitious.description:
{pawn_name} has high aspirations for themselves.

Prefers to be assigned a high ranking role.

Fearless.title: Fearless
Fearless.description:
{pawn_name} prefers not to back down from a fight.

Will not flee from combat.

LoudSnorer.title: Loud snorer
LoudSnorer.description: {pawn_name} snores extremely loudly and should probably sleep alone to avoid annoying others.

Jealous.title: Jealous
Jealous.description: {pawn_name} doesn't like others having things better than themselves.

Unhygienic.title: Unhygienic
Unhygienic.description:
{pawn_name} doesn't care much for personal hygiene.

Will spread twice as much dirt as normal.

NeatFreak.title: Neat freak
NeatFreak.description: {pawn_name} obsessively likes things to be neat and tidy.

Mumbler.title: Mumbler
Mumbler.description: {pawn_name} enjoys mumbling to {pawn_reflexive}, though sometimes at the annoyance of others.

Depressive.title: Depressive
Depressive.description:
{pawn_name} suffers from a personality disorder characterised by feelings of worthlessness, low self-esteem and joylessness.

Has a permanent mood debuff.

Chatterbox.title: Chatterbox
Chatterbox.description: {pawn_name} likes to talk a lot, which some people may find annoying but others may find comforting.

Earther.title: Earther
Earther.description: {pawn_name} prefers living life on a planet.

Spacer.title: Spacer
Spacer.description: {pawn_name} prefers living life in the vastness of space.

Lazy.title: Lazy
Lazy.description: {pawn_name} generally works slower than others and tends to want more sleep.

HardWorker.title: Hard worker
HardWorker.description: {pawn_name} believes in hard graft and likes to work quicker than others.

Nervous.title: Nervous
Nervous.description: {pawn_name} has a tendency to let {pawn_possessive} nerves get in the way, often causing undesired outcomes.

Tinkerer.title: Tinkerer
Tinkerer.description: For better or worse {pawn_pronoun} likes to tinker with things.

Greedy.title: Greedy
Greedy.description:
{pawn_name} always wants more than everyone else.

Has a higher chance of eating.

Creepy.title: Creepy
Creepy.description: {pawn_name} tends to make those around them feel uneasy.

HighlyStrung.title: Highly strung
HighlyStrung.description:
{pawn_name} reacts quickly to mood changes.

Morale changes will be quicker than normal.

Simple.title: Simple
Simple.description:
What {pawn_name} lacks in intelligence, they make up for in happiness.

Has a permanent mood buff.

QuickLearner.title: Quick learner
QuickLearner.description: {pawn_name} has a natural ability to learn quickly.

HighPainThreshold.title: High pain threshold
HighPainThreshold.description: {pawn_name} has a high threshold for pain.

LowPainThreshold.title: Low pain threshold
LowPainThreshold.description: {pawn_name} has a low threshold for pain.

Cannibal.title: Cannibal
Cannibal.description:
{pawn_name} prefers eating meat from their own species.

Will not get bad thoughts for eating those of the same species.

Persuasive.title: Persuasive
Persuasive.description: {pawn_name} is an excellent negotiator and has a natural ability to influence others.

Pushover.title: Pushover
Pushover.description: {pawn_name} finds it difficult to assert themselves, easily falling to the demands of others.

Nyctophobia.title: Nyctophobia
Nyctophobia.description: {pawn_name} has a fear of the dark.

Nyctophilia.title: Nyctophilia
Nyctophilia.description: {pawn_name} has a love of the dark.
